title: Review round 2: jmap-chat API idiomatics cleanup
notes: Round 2 confidence: 5% chance of missed bug. Checked: all 5 files in scope (auth.rs, client.rs, error.rs, jmap.rs, methods/mod.rs) plus sse.rs for SSE-related correctness. Verified all 6 round-1 P1 fixes are correct and complete. No new P0/P1 found. Found 2 new P2s: call_batch duplicate-ID error path has no test (dq9g.3), push_subscription_create duplicate accountId path has no test (dq9g.4). Checked: SSE error continuation with Some(state) is not a correctness bug (stream terminates on next poll). Checked: Patch<T> three-way deserialize is correct (absent->Keep via Default, null->Clear, value->Set). Checked: scan_from overlap logic and char-boundary fix are correct. Checked: call_batch after-move analysis — inv.call_id is not moved into map value, only clone is, so error message is safe. Running out of real complaints.
